description: A recently terminated employee calls to ask how they can continue their health insurance coverage under COBRA.

nodes.task_description: Identify the former employee in the HRIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the terminated employee's record.

nodes.task_description: Explain that they will receive a COBRA election packet from the third-party benefits administrator.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the process and timeline.

nodes.task_description: Provide the contact information for the third-party administrator for any further questions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the former employee the correct contact information.
